name: Bernhard Riemann
title: Mathematician
bio: German mathematician who made lasting contributions to analysis, number theory, and differential geometry, including the Riemann hypothesis and Riemannian geometry (which provided the mathematical foundation for Einstein's general relativity).
faith: The son of a Lutheran pastor, Riemann was a devout Christian throughout his life. He originally planned to study theology before pursuing mathematics.

sources.title: Bernhard Riemann — Wikipedia
sources.note: Biography including his pastoral family background and original intent to study theology

sources.title: Bernhard Riemann: Turning Points in the Conception of Mathematics — Detlef Laugwitz
sources.note: Mathematical biography noting Riemann's deep Lutheran piety — the son of a pastor, he nearly entered the ministry himself before choosing mathematics

tagline: Laid the foundations for Einstein's relativity while trusting in God's Word
